summary: Iteration 38 - Bug Fixes Testing Complete. All three reported bugs have been verified as fixed: 1) Countdown timer stall detection with Refresh Timer button, 2) BVE signal editing uses correct endpoint (PUT /api/bve/signals/{id}), 3) BVE mode editing does NOT affect production signals. Trade History Actions column (Reset button for admin) continues to work correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Countdown stall detection implemented correctly at lines 458-476 in TradeMonitorPage.jsx - checks if lastCountdownUpdateRef hasn't been updated in 3 seconds
restartCountdown function at lines 638-714 properly restores countdown from localStorage and resets stall state
Refresh Timer button with data-testid='refresh-countdown-btn' at lines 1303-1308 provides manual refresh option
handleSaveEdit in AdminSignalsPage.jsx (lines 176-205) correctly checks isInBVE and uses bveAPI.updateSignal for BVE mode
BVE signals are stored in separate collection (bve_trading_signals) ensuring production signals are not affected
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes verified: 1) Countdown timer has stall detection (3 second check) and Refresh Timer button available during countdown, 2) BVE signal editing uses PUT /api/bve/signals/{id} endpoint when in BVE mode, 3) Production signals stored in separate collection from BVE signals. Trade History Actions column shows Reset button for master_admin. One trade exists in history (Jan 14, MOIL10, BUY, $299.90 actual profit).

countdown_timer_stall_detection.details: countdownStalled state tracks if timer hasn't updated in 3 seconds. lastCountdownUpdateRef.current is updated on each countdown tick. Stall warning UI shows amber warning with 'Countdown may have stalled' message.

countdown_refresh_timer_button.details: Refresh Timer button with data-testid='refresh-countdown-btn' is available during countdown. restartCountdown function clears existing interval, gets target time from localStorage, and starts fresh countdown.

bve_signal_editing_endpoint.details: PUT /api/bve/signals/{signal_id} endpoint exists and works correctly. Returns 400 if no active BVE session, 404 if signal not found. handleSaveEdit in AdminSignalsPage.jsx checks isInBVE and uses bveAPI.updateSignal.

bve_mode_isolation.details: BVE signals stored in bve_trading_signals collection, separate from production trading_signals collection. Editing in BVE mode does NOT affect production signals.

trade_history_actions_column.details: Actions column visible in Trade History table. Master admin sees Reset button with data-testid='reset-trade-{trade_id}'. Reset endpoint (DELETE /api/trade/reset/{trade_id}) requires master_admin role.

api_tests.POST /api/auth/login (master_admin): PASS - Returns token and user with role=master_admin
api_tests.GET /api/trade/history: PASS - Returns trades with Actions column data
api_tests.GET /api/trade/active-signal: PASS - Returns active signal or null

ui_tests.login_flow: PASS - Master admin can login successfully
ui_tests.trade_monitor_page: PASS - Page loads with Trade Control and Trade History sections
ui_tests.trade_history_actions_column: PASS - Actions column header visible, Reset button visible for master_admin
ui_tests.bve_mode_entry: PASS - BVE button in header, Enter BVE dialog, BVE mode banner displayed
ui_tests.bve_trading_signals_page: PASS - Shows 'BVE Trading Signals' title, signals isolated from production
ui_tests.bve_signal_creation: PASS - New Signal button creates BVE signal with 'SIMULATED' status

code_verification.countdown_stall_detection_effect: Lines 458-476: useEffect checks if lastCountdownUpdateRef hasn't updated in 3 seconds
code_verification.restart_countdown_function: Lines 638-714: restartCountdown clears interval, gets target from localStorage, starts fresh countdown
code_verification.refresh_timer_button: Lines 1303-1308: Button with data-testid='refresh-countdown-btn' and text 'Refresh Timer'
code_verification.stall_warning_ui: Lines 1258-1270: Amber warning with 'Countdown may have stalled' message
code_verification.bve_signal_edit_check: Lines 176-205 in AdminSignalsPage.jsx: handleSaveEdit checks isInBVE and uses bveAPI.updateSignal
